---
title: "Blog"
subtitle: "Notes on cricket, handball, and statistical methodology — mostly work in progress, thinking out loud."
pagetitle: "Blog — Ruwan C. Karunanayaka"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
  fields: [date, title, reading-time, description, categories]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
description: "Notes on statistical methodology — how to design studies, measure reliably, and trust the numbers."
---
